summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that FDS is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $214.29. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 16.7%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $293.43 and a significant trendline confluence around $285.32 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
